codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case05_merge","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case05_merge/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(ID), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(PREFIX), '') AS PREFIX, NULLIF(TRIM(FNAME), '') AS FNAME, NULLIF(TRIM(LNAME), '') AS LNAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(AGE), '') AS SMALLINT) AS AGE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(BALANCE), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS BALANCE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(VERSION_DATE), ''), 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case05_merge","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case05_merge/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
